keyword: best air purifier for litter box odor
title: Best Air Purifier for Litter Box Odor (Cat-Toilet Smell Control)
meta: Purifiers placed by the litter box that actually cut ammonia and odor.
intro: Litter-box odor is mostly ammonia from urine. A purifier with a real carbon stage near the box helps; placement beats specs.

sections.body: Only activated-carbon filters trap odor; HEPA alone catches particles, not smell.
Put the purifier a foot or two from the box, not across the room.
You don't need a huge unit; match CADR to the box area.

products.name: Pet Odor Air Purifier Carbon
products.asin_query: air purifier litter box odor carbon

faq.a: It cuts it sharply; scooping daily still matters.
Every 3-6 months with a cat; sooner in multi-cat homes.
